title: nRF52840 gateway build lacks lora0 devicetree alias
description: After fixing project-LICHEN-zq76, the requested build command gets past OSCORE compilation and stops later in firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c. nrf52840dk/nrf52840 has no devicetree alias lora0, triggering BUILD_ASSERT(DT_NODE_EXISTS(DT_ALIAS(lora0))) and DEVICE_DT_GET(DT_ALIAS(lora0)) failures. Decide whether this board needs a LoRa overlay/alias, a different validation board, or conditional L2 enablement for boards without LoRa hardware.
close_reason: Fixed generic nRF52840DK gateway LoRa gating; requested west build now succeeds without lora0 alias.
